title: Human–AI collaboration
tagline: Human–AI collaboration meta-analysis: one record per condition × metric (all three Perf values per record; study-constant fields shown once as study info).
description: Extracts a human–AI collaboration experiment per a pre-registered data dictionary. One record per experimental condition crossed with each performance metric — each record carries the human-alone, AI-alone and human+AI means and SDs for that condition, plus the study-level task (type/domain/data/output), AI system (incl. LLM descriptors, multi-agent, fine-tuning), collaboration design, and participants. The reviewer shows fields identical across all conditions once in a shared study-information panel, and the varying ones per record. Raw reported values only.
task_description: Extract one record per experimental condition × metric with the full field set; study-constant fields are shown once as study info.
context: Human–AI collaboration / decision-support experiments comparing human-alone, AI-alone, and human+AI performance across one or more conditions.
